arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth joins new club in first role since Man Utd admitted £4.1m blunder
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth has taken on his first role following the end of his short-lived spell at Manchester United and is lending his expertise to another sporting world, albeit on a freelance basis

arts.sum: Former Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has been out of work since he was sacked by the Red Devils in October.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Man United told staff they would be making 200 MORE redundancies... after giving them pie, chips and water in plastic cups

arts.ttl: Newcastle join Man United in race for 49-goal, 23-assist attacker as exit looms after manager fallout
arts.sum: Newcastle are said to be considering a move to sign Atalanta star Ademola Lookman in the summer transfer window. This is according to the latest report from TEAMtalk, who claim that the Magpies have joined Man United in the race to sign the highly-rated attacker. arts.ttl: Man United 'losing patience' with attacker following goal drought
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly 'losing patience' with forward Rasmus Hojlund, who is struggling to find his best form this season.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth new job 'revealed' just months after brutal Man United sacking and £4.1m pay-out
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth left Manchester United in December after less than six months as the club's director

arts.ttl: Manchester United player’s ‘agents are working’ towards exit – European giants interested
arts.sum: Mason Mount has had a torrid time at Manchester United so far. The Englishman has been plagued by injuries and this season he has played only 403 minutes in all competitions. As of now, he is nursing a thigh problem having previously picked up a hamstring injury.
